title: Ola Cabs Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Ola Cabs Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Ola Cabs Global Group are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ola Cabs Global Group:
Ola Cabs Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ola Cabs Global Group!
